outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Vance heads to Pakistan for talks to end the war between Iran, the US and Israel
outlets.summary: NPR covers Vance departure for Islamabad — first face-to-face US-Iran talks since war began. Kushner and Witkoff accompany.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump fumes as Iran retains choke hold on Strait of Hormuz ahead of peace talks
outlets.summary: WaPo reports Trump frustrated by Iran's continued Hormuz leverage despite ceasefire. Strait effectively closed.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Hegseth declares 'decisive military victory' in Iran: Trump 'forged this moment'
outlets.summary: Fox frames Hegseth's Pentagon briefing as vindication — CENTCOM dismantled Iran's military in under 40 days using 10% of US combat power.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Iran Partially Opens Strait Of Hormuz, Admits To Placing Naval Mines
outlets.summary: Daily Caller reports Iran admitting to placing mines in Hormuz. Only 6 ships transited despite 'opening.'

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Pakistan sets modest goal for US-Iran summit: A deal to keep talks going
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera reports Pakistan's modest expectations — goal is agreement to continue negotiations, not a breakthrough.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: US inflation surges to 3.3% as Iran war fuels energy price shock
outlets.summary: Euronews covers CPI data showing war-driven inflation surge. Gasoline +21.2% monthly — biggest jump since 1967.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF says it killed Hezbollah chief's secretary as some 70 rockets fired from Lebanon
outlets.summary: IDF claims elimination of Hezbollah chief's secretary. 70 rockets struck northern Israel causing widespread damage.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF kills Lebanese Resistance Brigade commander, Hezbollah chief's secretary in latest strikes
outlets.summary: JPost covers IDF targeting of Hezbollah command structure — senior figures eliminated in precision strikes.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iranian delegation arrives in Islamabad for truce talks, insists on preconditions
outlets.summary: PressTV frames delegation arrival as Iran entering talks from position of strength. Ghalibaf sets preconditions.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: President Pezeshkian: Iran will never abandon Lebanon in face of Israeli aggression
outlets.summary: Iranian president vows solidarity with Lebanon despite ceasefire. Warns Israeli strikes 'violate temporary truce.'
